title: [Moonsu] Better GUI Create Style for Better Smithing Table
description: Do you like the interface? Now even more! With the new design for the "Better Smithing Table" mod
body:
## Again I have decided to reinvent the GUI
![Better GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8d6ec9707858c6d70f93a990a427abb09084a7e.png)
_**(Check the "images" tab if the main image does not load)**_

![Better GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1296aee4bfbd25786880871b97f47c8e2af98c0b.png)

## Link mod!: [[Better Smithing Table](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettersmithingtable)]
Credits to the creator, without him the icon and the new interface would not be possible: **jjblock21**

### Can i use for my modpack?
**Sure! no problem, but I would appreciate if you could leave credits.**


Any questions or suggestions can be left in the Official Discord: [Discord](https://discord.gg/bGfyh9EXrT)!
